items.description: Discover Yacktman Asset Management's Q3 2025 portfolio moves, key holdings, and strategy insights.

items.title: IREN's AI Takeover Begins
items.description: IREN secured a $9.7 billion, five-year AI Cloud contract with Microsoft covering 200MW and 20% upfront payment. Read why IREN stock is a Buy.

items.title: AMD reports better-than-expected results but margin guidance only meets estimates
items.description: The chipmaker is working on a major deal with OpenAI

items.title: AI Stocks Wipe Out Over $500B As Palantir Reminds Traders The Party Can't Last Forever
items.description: A sharp tech selloff wiped out over $500B as Palantir, Nvidia, and others tumbled. Valuation concerns grow with CAPE ratio nearing dot-com bubble highs.

items.title: CloudFit Software Launches easyCMMC to Help Defense Contractors Meet 2025 CMMC Compliance Mandates
items.description: CloudFit Software, a Microsoft Partner and leading provider of secure managed services, is announcing the launch of easyCMMC, a turnkey solution designed to help defense contractors meet upcoming Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) requirements ahead of the November 2025 Phase 1 rule implementation.
